question:
Over 150,000 bidders in the MegaETH public sale?

Description: This market will resolve to “Yes” if the total number of bidders in the MegaETH public sale on Sonar exceeds 150,000 before the sale closes. Otherwise, it will resolve to “No.”

The resolution source is the official raise page available at https://token.megaeth.com/.

If the final bidder count cannot be verified by December 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET, or if relevant information becomes permanently unavailable within the market timeframe, this market will resolve to “No.”

evidences.title: MegaETH | The MegaETH Public Sale: A Reminder to Stand on Business
evidences.content: Published: 10/22/2025 [...] Loading post... Now, as we enter mainnet, a public sale is being launched with Sonar to create space for users (and potential users) who also want to be investors in $MEGA. This public sale will make non-insider investors the single largest stakeholder in the MegaETH network, larger than the VCs and the team. The real community for MegaETH is its $MEGA investor community, many of whom will be active users and ecosystem supporters. This non-consensus sale will help identify those who believe in our non-consensus blockchain. ## Why this Public Sale on Sonar is Unique Firstly, you choose a valuation you believe is compelling. A ceiling valuation will be set at $999M, mostly because auction systems can run rampant and retail shouldn't be forced to enter at unicorn valuations. [...] Public Sale Details Depth (Contributor Priority). Prioritized fills go to participants who've already contributed towards the development or growth of MegaETH and/or Ethereum. Breadth (Community Floor). Majority of users receive smaller fills to maximize unique holders and true community distribution. What counts as contribution (public signals that can be verified):

evidences.title: The MegaETH Public Sale: A Reminder to Stand on Business
evidences.content: The second component of the MegaETH public sale comes into play if there is an oversubscription at the clearing price. On mainnet, we will have additional tokens up for grabs by those who attempted to participate in the Sonar, Echo and Fluffle sales. ## Allocation Method for Oversubscribed Sales If the sale is oversubscribed at the clearing price, a U-Shaped Allocation system will be used to prioritize broad distribution while rewarding key contributors. The U-Shaped Allocation process ensures broad token distribution while prioritizing key contributors. MegaETH and Ethereum core supporters receive priority allocations, while at least 5,000 participants receive baseline allocations starting at $2,650. Public Sale Details [...] Loading post... Now, as we enter mainnet, a public sale is being launched with Sonar to create space for users (and potential users) who also want to be investors in $MEGA. This public sale will make non-insider investors the single largest stakeholder in the MegaETH network, larger than the VCs and the team. The real community for MegaETH is its $MEGA investor community, many of whom will be active users and ecosystem supporters. This non-consensus sale w...

evidences.title: How to Join MegaETH Public Sale?
evidences.content: 1. Visit the Registration Page: Go to token.megaeth.com. 2. Connect Your Wallet: Click "Connect Wallet" and select MetaMask or your EVM-compatible wallet. 3. Connect to Sonar (Echo): Click "Connect Sonar" and sign up at app.echo.xyz. Complete KYC by uploading your passport/ID, a utility bill, and a selfie. Verification may take minutes to hours. 4. Link Social Accounts and Additional Wallets: Connect X (Twitter), Discord, and GitHub to boost your allocation score. You can link up to three on-chain wallets to prove activity. 5. Wait for the Sale: On October 27, 2025, at 1:00 PM UTC, return to the site, select your bid amount (between $2,650 and $186,282 in USDT), and choose the 1-year lockup option if desired for a 10% discount. [...] If oversubscribed, a U-Shaped Allocation model applies: It ensures wide distribution (at least 5,000 participants get the minimum $2,650 allocation) while deeper rewards go to core supporters based on on-chain activity, NFT holdings (e.g., Fluffle), social engagement (X, Discord), and GitHub contributions. This limits whale influence and favors committed community members. MegaETH Public Sale ### Timeline Registration is open now through October 27,...

evidences.title: How was the MegaETH Layer 2 token publicly sold?
evidences.content: introduction of its native cryptocurrency, $MEGA, to the public market was a pivotal moment, executed through a specific and increasingly popular method: an English auction on the Sonar platform. This article explores the intricacies of this public sale, delving into the mechanisms, implications, and broader context of the $MEGA token distribution. [...] The choice of an English auction reflects a preference for market-driven valuation and transparency, allowing participants to directly influence the token's initial price. Coupled with the robust infrastructure of a platform like Sonar, this method provided a structured environment for the public to acquire $MEGA tokens. As MegaETH continues its development to deliver high transaction speeds and real-time performance for decentralized applications, the successful distribution of its native token through this public sale laid the groundwork for a community of vested stakeholders ready to contribute to its growth and adoption. The ongoing utility of the $MEGA token for governance, transaction fees, and staking will be critical in shaping the long-term value and ecosystem health of the [...] ### Demystifying Token Public Sales: Why...

evidences.title: MegaETH | Privacy Policy
evidences.content: Personal information. References to “personal information” in this Privacy Policy should be understood to include a reference to “personal data” as defined in the “GDPR” (i.e., the General Data Protection Regulation 2016/679 ( “EU GDPR”)) and the EU GDPR as it forms part of the laws of the United Kingdom ( “UK GDPR” ) Under the GDPR, “personal data” means information about individuals from which they are either directly identified or can be identified. The personal information that we collect from and about you is described in greater detail in the section “Personal Information we collect” that is set out above. [...] Business transferees. We may disclose personal information in the context of actual or prospective business transactions (e.g., investments in MegaETH, financing of MegaETH, public stock offerings, or the sale, transfer or merger of all or part of our business, assets or shares), for example, we may need to share certain personal information with prospective counterparties and their advisers. We may also disclose your personal information to an acquirer, successor, or assignee of MegaETH as part of any merger, acquisition, sale of assets, or similar transaction, an...
